div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Cuba (Braden)
div.p: 624. From Brown,Courtney Brown, vice president of the Commodity Credit Corporation. CCC. You are requested to make a firm offer to the Cuban Sugar Stabilization Institute for the 300,000 tons of free sugar produced in Cuba during the 1943 crop,The Purchase Agreement on the 1943 sugar crop authorized the production of 300,000 short tons of raw sugar for sale in world markets, and granted to Commodity Credit Corporation an option on its purchase. under the same terms as governed the purchase of the 2,700,000 tons. If accepted you are authorized to exchange letters immediately so that June first payment can include this sugar, providing that the Institute can issue proper identity certificates by that date. [Brown.]
